decision.summary: Take profit on the 67k reach Yes position; no new trade has a clean edge right now.
decision.rationale: Polymarket shows the meaningful open position is `will-bitcoin-reach-67k-on-march-29` on `Yes`, now priced at 90.0%, which is in the playbook take-profit zone. Beecthor’s latest thesis remains macro bearish but with a corrective rebound first, and Binance confirms that rebound is underway with BTC at 66839.61 and a 24h high of 67288.94. After managing existing exposure, the nearest bearish market below price is `will-bitcoin-dip-to-66k-on-march-29` at 52%, but the current thesis favors near-term corrective strength toward 68k-68.6k and possibly 70k-71k before the larger downside resumes, so there is not a strong enough edge to open a new position now.
